_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Node.js Generic
author: eggs@pashka.host
description: A generic Node.js egg with native Git support. Clones or pulls a repo on every start. Supports .js, .ts, .mjs and .cjs entry points, and npm, Yarn and pnpm.
startup: if [ "${AUTO_UPDATE}" == "1" ]; then GIT_ADDRESS_NORM="${GIT_ADDRESS}"; if [[ "${GIT_ADDRESS_NORM}" != *.git ]]; then GIT_ADDRESS_NORM="${GIT_ADDRESS_NORM}.git"; fi; USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"; REPO_URL="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_ADDRESS_NORM}"; BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"; if [ ! -d .git ] || [ ! -f .git/config ]; then echo "Cloning repo..."; rm -rf * .git && git clone --branch "$BRANCH" "$REPO_URL" .; else echo "Pulling latest from $BRANCH..."; git fetch origin "$BRANCH" && git reset --hard FETCH_HEAD; fi; fi; if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ "${USE_YARN}" == "1" ]; then yarn install ${YARN_FLAGS}; elif [ "${USE_PNPM}" == "1" ]; then pnpm install ${PNPM_FLAGS}; else npm install ${NPM_FLAGS}; fi; fi; if [ ! -z "${NODE_PACKAGES}" ]; then npm install ${NODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ ! -z "${UNNODE_PACKAGES}" ]; then npm uninstall ${UNNODE_PACKAGES}; fi; if [ ! -z "${PRE_START_CMD}" ]; then echo "Running pre-start command..."; eval "${PRE_START_CMD}"; fi; export NODE_ENV="${NODE_ENV:-production}"; FILE_TO_RUN="${MAIN_FILE:-index.js}"; case "$FILE_TO_RUN" in *.js|*.mjs|*.cjs) node "/home/container/$FILE_TO_RUN" ${NODE_ARGS} ;; *.ts) ts-node --esm "/home/container/$FILE_TO_RUN" ${NODE_ARGS} ;; *) echo "Unsupported file extension: $FILE_TO_RUN"; exit 1 ;; esac

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Node.js Generic — Installation Script
# Support: eggs@pashka.host

apt update -y
apt install -y git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 python3-dev python3-pip libtool

echo "Updating npm to latest..."
npm install npm@latest --location=global

if [ "${USE_YARN}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Installing Yarn..."
    npm install -g yarn
fi

if [ "${USE_PNPM}" == "1" ]; then
    echo "Installing pnpm..."
    npm install -g pnpm
fi

mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "No git repo set — skipping clone."
    exit 0
fi

if [[ ${GIT_ADDRESS} != *.git ]]; then
    GIT_ADDRESS=${GIT_ADDRESS}.git
fi

USERNAME_NORM="${USERNAME:-git}"

if [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo "Using anonymous clone."
else
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME_NORM}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

BRANCH="${BRANCH:-main}"

if [ "$(ls -A /mnt/server)" ]; then
    if [ -d .git ] && [ -f .git/config ]; then
        ORIGIN=$(git config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [ "${ORIGIN}" == "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
            echo "Pulling latest from ${BRANCH}..."
            git pull origin ${BRANCH}
        else
            echo "Different repo detected — skipping pull."
        fi
    else
        echo "Files found with no git config — skipping to avoid data loss."
        exit 10
    fi
else
    echo "Cloning ${GIT_ADDRESS} (branch: ${BRANCH})..."
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    echo "Installing packages..."
    if [ "${USE_YARN}" == "1" ]; then
        yarn install
    elif [ "${USE_PNPM}" == "1" ]; then
        pnpm install
    else
        npm install --production
    fi
fi

echo "Installation complete."
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Full HTTPS URL of the Git repository to clone.

variables.name: Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone and pull from on each start.

variables.name: Git Username
variables.description: Username for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Personal access token for authenticating with a private repository.

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pulls the latest changes from the repository on every startup.

variables.name: Main File
variables.description: Entry point of the application. Supports .js, .ts, .mjs and .cjs.

variables.name: Node Arguments
variables.description: Extra arguments passed to the node process at startup.

variables.name: Pre-Start Command
variables.description: Shell command to run after install but before the app starts.

variables.name: Extra Packages
variables.description: Additional npm packages to install at startup, space-separated.

variables.name: Remove Packages
variables.description: npm packages to uninstall at startup, space-separated.

variables.name: Use Yarn
variables.description: Uses Yarn instead of npm for package management.

variables.name: Yarn Flags
variables.description: Extra flags passed to yarn install.

variables.name: Use pnpm
variables.description: Uses pnpm instead of npm for package management.

variables.name: pnpm Flags
variables.description: Extra flags passed to pnpm install.

variables.name: npm Flags
variables.description: Extra flags passed to npm install.
